allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\11\\Desktop\\мой любимый мессенджер\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "manage.py","runserver","127.0.0.1:8000","--noreload" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/login" -Method POST -Body '{}' -ContentType 'application/json' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $r.StatusCode } catch { "HTTP: " + $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ })
